nasb.text: “Behold, the rulers of Israel, each according to his power, have been in you for the purpose of shedding blood.

esv.text: “Behold, the princes of Israel in you, every one according to his power, have been bent on shedding blood.

cnv.text: 看哪！以色列的領袖們恃著自己的能力，在你裡面流人的血。

ccb.text: “‘看啊，在你城中的以色列首领各逞权势，杀人流血。
